title: The Campaign by 'Ubaydallah b. Abi Bakrah in Sijistan
description: Si jistan According to Hishim -Abu Mikhnaf- Abu al-Mukhariq alRasibi: When al-Hajjij appointed al-Muhallab to Khurasin and 'Ubaydallih b. Abi Bakrah to Sijistan, al-Muhallab went out to Khurisin and 'Ubaydallah b. Abi Bakrah to Sijistin; this was in the year 78 (697-698). 'Ubaydallah b. Abi Bakrah remained inactive the rest of this year, then attacked Zunbil. 659 Zunbil had been under a truce, with the Arabs collecting land taxes from him; but he had several times held back and refused to pay.660 AlIlajjij then wrote to 'Ubaydallah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
